   556→CLIENTKEYS = gears.table.join(
   557→	awful.key({ altkey, "Shift" }, "m", lain.util.magnify_client, { description = "magnify client", group = "client" }),
   558→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "f", function(c)

   562→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "c", function(c)
   563→		c:kill()

   566→		{ MODKEY, "Control" },
   567→		"space",

   570→	),
   571→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "Return", function(c)
   572→		c:swap(awful.client.getmaster())
   573→	end, { description = "move to master", group = "client" }),
   574→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "o", function(c)
   575→		c:move_to_screen()
   576→	end, { description = "move to screen", group = "client" }),
   577→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "y", function(c)
   578→		c.ontop = not c.ontop
   579→	end, { description = "toggle keep on top", group = "client" }),
   580→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "y", function(c)
   581→		c.sticky = not c.sticky
   582→	end, { description = "toggle sticky", group = "client" }),
   583→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "n", function(c)
   584→		-- The client currently has the input focus, so it cannot be
   585→		-- minimized, since minimized clients can't have the focus.
   586→		c.minimized = true
   587→	end, { description = "minimize", group = "client" }),
   588→	awful.key({ MODKEY }, "m", function(c)
   589→		c.maximized = not c.maximized
   590→		c:raise()
   591→	end, { description = "(un)maximize", group = "client" }),
   592→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "m", function(c)
   593→		c.maximized_vertical = not c.maximized_vertical
   594→		c:raise()
   595→	end, { description = "(un)maximize vertically", group = "client" }),
   596→	awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "m", function(c)
   597→		c.maximized_horizontal = not c.maximized_horizontal
   598→		c:raise()
   599→	end, { description = "(un)maximize horizontally", group = "client" })
   600→)

   602→-- This should map on the top row of your keyboard, usually 1 to 9.
   603→for i = 1, 9 do
   604→	GLOBALKEYS = gears.table.join(
   605→		GLOBALKEYS,
   606→		-- View tag only.
   607→		awful.key({ MODKEY }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   608→			screen = awful.screen.focused()
   609→			tag = screen.tags[i]
   610→			if tag then
   611→				tag:view_only()
   612→			end
   613→		end, { description = "view tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
   614→		-- Toggle tag display.
   615→		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   616→			screen = awful.screen.focused()
   617→			tag = screen.tags[i]
   618→			if tag then
   619→				awful.tag.viewtoggle(tag)
   620→			end
   621→		end, { description = "toggle tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
   622→		-- Move client to tag.
   623→		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Shift" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   624→			if client.focus then
   625→				tag = client.focus.screen.tags[i]
   626→				if tag then
   627→					client.focus:move_to_tag(tag)
   628→				end
   629→			end
   630→		end, { description = "move focused client to tag #" .. i, group = "tag" }),
   631→		-- Toggle tag on focused client.
   632→		awful.key({ MODKEY, "Control", "Shift" }, "#" .. i + 9, function()
   633→			if client.focus then
   634→				tag = client.focus.screen.tags[i]
   635→				if tag then
   636→					client.focus:toggle_tag(tag)
   637→				end
   638→			end
   639→		end, { description = "toggle focused client on tag #" .. i, group = "tag" })
   640→	)
   641→end

   643→local clientbuttons = gears.table.join(
   644→	awful.button({}, 1, function(c)
   645→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_click", { raise = true })
   646→	end),
   647→	awful.button({ MODKEY }, 1, function(c)

   649→		awful.mouse.client.move(c)

   651→	awful.button({ MODKEY }, 3, function(c)
   652→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_click", { raise = true })
   653→		awful.mouse.client.resize(c)
   654→	end)
   655→)

   661→-- {{{ Rules
   662→-- Rules to apply to new clients (through the "manage" signal).
   663→
   664→-- Function to check the number of displays
   665→-- local function get_screen_count()
   666→-- 	return screen.count()
   667→-- end
   668→--
   669→-- -- Define the rules based on the number of displays
   670→-- local rules = {}
   671→
   672→-- if get_screen_count() == 2 then
   673→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Brave-browser" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "2" } })
   674→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "kitty" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "1" } })
   675→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Postman" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "3" } })
   676→-- 	table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Slack" }, properties = { screen = 2, tag = "1" } })
   677→-- else
   678→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Brave-browser" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "2" } })
   679→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "kitty" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "1" } })
   680→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Postman" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "3" } })
   681→-- table.insert(rules, { rule = { class = "Slack" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "4" } })
   682→-- end
   683→
   684→-- Check if this is a theme switch restart or normal restart
   685→local is_theme_switch = io.open("/tmp/awesome_theme_switch", "r") ~= nil
   686→local is_normal_restart = io.open("/tmp/awesome_normal_restart", "r") ~= nil
   687→local is_any_restart = is_theme_switch or is_normal_restart
   688→
   689→awful.rules.rules = {
   690→	-- All clients will match this rule.
   691→	{
   692→		rule = {},
   693→		properties = {
   694→			border_width = beautiful.border_width,
   695→			border_color = beautiful.border_normal,
   696→			focus = awful.client.focus.filter,
   697→			raise = true,
   698→			keys = CLIENTKEYS,
   699→			buttons = clientbuttons,
   700→			screen = awful.screen.preferred,
   701→			placement = awful.placement.no_overlap + awful.placement.no_offscreen,
   702→		},
   703→	},
   704→
   705→	-- Only apply tag rules if this is NOT any kind of restart
   706→	{ rule = { class = "kitty" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "1" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   707→	{ rule = { class = "obsidian" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "2" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   708→	{
   709→		rule = { class = "Brave-browser" },
   710→		properties = { screen = 1, tag = "3" },
   711→		rule_any = { is_any_restart = false },
   712→	},
   713→	{ rule = { class = "bruno" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "4" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   714→	{ rule = { class = "firefox" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "5" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   715→	{ rule = { class = "Slack" }, properties = { screen = 1, tag = "6" }, rule_any = { is_any_restart = false } },
   716→
   717→	-- Add titlebars to normal clients and dialogs
   718→	{ rule_any = { type = { "normal", "dialog" } }, properties = { titlebars_enabled = false } },
   719→}
   720→-- }}}
   721→
   722→-- {{{ Signals
   723→-- Signal function to execute when a new client appears.
   724→client.connect_signal("manage", function(c)
   725→	-- Set the windows at the slave,
   726→	-- i.e. put it at the end of others instead of setting it master.
   727→	-- if not awesome.startup then awful.client.setslave(c) end
   728→
   729→	if awesome.startup and not c.size_hints.user_position and not c.size_hints.program_position then
   730→		-- Prevent clients from being unreachable after screen count changes.
   731→		awful.placement.no_offscreen(c)
   732→	end
   733→
   734→	-- Don't focus this client if we're restoring a tag
   735→	if _restoring_tag then
   736→		c:emit_signal("request::activate", "manage", { raise = false })
   737→	end
   738→end)
   739→
   740→-- Add a titlebar if titlebars_enabled is set to true in the rules.
   741→client.connect_signal("request::titlebars", function(c)
   742→	-- Custom
   743→	if beautiful.titlebar_fun then
   744→		beautiful.titlebar_fun(c)
   745→		return
   746→	end
   747→
   748→	-- buttons for the titlebar
   749→	local buttons = gears.table.join(
   750→		awful.button({}, 1, function()
   751→			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "titlebar", { raise = true })
   752→			awful.mouse.client.move(c)
   753→		end),
   754→		awful.button({}, 3, function()
   755→			c:emit_signal("request::activate", "titlebar", { raise = true })
   756→			awful.mouse.client.resize(c)
   757→		end)
   758→	)
   759→
   760→	awful.titlebar(c):setup({
   761→		{ -- Left
   762→			awful.titlebar.widget.iconwidget(c),
   763→			buttons = buttons,
   764→			layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   765→		},
   766→		{ -- Middle
   767→			-- { -- Title
   768→			--     align  = "center",
   769→			--     widget = awful.titlebar.widget.titlewidget(c)
   770→			-- },
   771→			-- buttons = buttons,
   772→			-- layout = wibox.layout.flex.horizontal,
   773→		},
   774→		{ -- Right
   775→			awful.titlebar.widget.floatingbutton(c),
   776→			awful.titlebar.widget.maximizedbutton(c),
   777→			awful.titlebar.widget.stickybutton(c),
   778→			awful.titlebar.widget.ontopbutton(c),
   779→			awful.titlebar.widget.closebutton(c),
   780→			layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal(),
   781→		},
   782→		layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
   783→	})
   784→end)
   785→
   786→-- Enable sloppy focus, so that focus follows mouse.
   787→client.connect_signal("mouse::enter", function(c)
   788→	c:emit_signal("request::activate", "mouse_enter", { raise = false })
   789→end)
   790→
   791→client.connect_signal("focus", function(c)
   792→	c.border_color = beautiful.border_focus
   793→end)
   794→client.connect_signal("unfocus", function(c)
   795→	c.border_color = beautiful.border_normal
   796→end)
   797→-- }}}

1→-- Music widget using playerctl (for browser/Spotify/etc)
     2→local wibox = require("wibox")
     3→local awful = require("awful")
     4→local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
     5→local gears = require("gears")
     6→
     7→local music_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
     8→music_text.align = "center"
     9→music_text.forced_width = 24
    10→local album_art = wibox.widget.imagebox()
    11→
    12→local text_scroll = wibox.container.scroll.horizontal(music_text, 40)
    13→local text_area = wibox.container.constraint(text_scroll, "exact", 24, nil)
    14→
    15→-- Create control buttons
    16→local prev_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    17→local next_button = wibox.widget.textbox()
    18→
    19→-- Set initial button text with everforest colors
    20→prev_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏮")))
    21→next_button:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#A7C080", "⏭")))
    22→
    23→-- Set initial state: collapsed with music note
    24→prev_button.visible = false
    25→next_button.visible = false
    26→music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", "♪")))
    27→
    28→local function update_music()
    29→	-- Query all players, get the first one that is Playing or Paused
    30→	awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell(
    31→		[[playerctl -a metadata --format '{{status}}|||{{artist}}|||{{title}}|||{{xesam:url}}|||{{mpris:artUrl}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^Playing\|^Paused']],
    32→		function(stdout)
    33→			stdout = stdout:gsub("\n", ""):gsub("\r", ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")
    34→
    35→			if stdout == "" then
    36→				album_art:set_image(nil)
    37→				prev_button.visible = false
    38→				next_button.visible = false
    39→				text_area.width = 24
    40→				music_text.forced_width = 24
    41→				music_text.align = "center"
    42→				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
    43→				return
    44→			end
    45→
    46→			local artist, title, url, art_url = stdout:match("^[^|]+|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)|||(.-)$")
    47→			artist = artist or ""
    48→			title = title or ""
    49→			url = url or ""
    50→			art_url = art_url or ""
    51→
    52→			-- Fallback to filename from URL if title is empty
    53→			if title == "" and url ~= "" then
    54→				title = url:match("([^/]+)$") or url
    55→				title = title:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)
    56→				title = title:gsub("%.[^%.]+$", "")
    57→			end
    58→
    59→			local song
    60→			if artist ~= "" and title ~= "" then
    61→				song = artist .. " - " .. title
    62→			elseif title ~= "" then
    63→				song = title
    64→			else
    65→				song = ""
    66→			end
    67→
    68→			if song ~= "" and string.len(song) > 3 then
    69→				prev_button.visible = true
    70→				next_button.visible = true
    71→				text_area.width = 150
    72→				music_text.forced_width = nil
    73→				music_text.align = "left"
    74→				if art_url ~= "" and art_url ~= "file://" then
    75→					album_art:set_image(art_url:gsub("file://", ""))
    76→				else
    77→					album_art:set_image(nil)
    78→				end
    79→				local display = song:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">")
    80→				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. display .. " ")))
    81→			else
    82→				album_art:set_image(nil)
    83→				prev_button.visible = false
    84→				next_button.visible = false
    85→				text_area.width = 24
    86→				music_text.forced_width = 24
    87→				music_text.align = "center"
    88→				music_text:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#859289", "♪")))
    89→			end
    90→		end
    91→	)
    92→end
    93→
    94→local music_widget = wibox.container.background(
    95→	wibox.container.margin(
    96→		wibox.widget({
    97→			-- Left side with prev button
    98→			{
    99→				prev_button,
   100→				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   101→			},
   102→			-- Center with album art and scrolling music text
   103→			{
   104→				album_art,
   105→				text_area,
   106→				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   107→			},
   108→			-- Right side with next button
   109→			{
   110→				next_button,
   111→				layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
   112→			},
   113→			layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
   114→		}),
   115→		2,
   116→		4
   117→	),
   118→	"#425047",
   119→	gears.shape.rounded_rect
   120→)
   121→
   122→-- Make buttons clickable
   123→prev_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   124→	awful.spawn("playerctl previous")
   125→	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   126→	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   127→		update_music()
   128→	end)
   129→end)))
   130→
   131→next_button:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, function()
   132→	awful.spawn("playerctl next")
   133→	-- Add a small delay before updating to allow the player to change
   134→	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   135→		update_music()
   136→	end)
   137→end)))
   138→
   139→-- Make music text clickable for play/pause
   140→local function toggle_play_pause()
   141→	awful.spawn("playerctl play-pause")
   142→	gears.timer.delayed_call(function()
   143→		update_music()
   144→	end)
   145→end
   146→music_text:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   147→text_scroll:buttons(awful.util.table.join(awful.button({}, 1, toggle_play_pause)))
   148→
   149→-- Initial update
   150→update_music()
   151→
   152→-- Update every 4 seconds
   153→local timer = gears.timer({ timeout = 4 })
   154→timer:connect_signal("timeout", update_music)
   155→timer:start()
   156→
   157→return music_widget
   158→

1→-- Crypto prices (BTC + ETH in EUR)
     2→local wibox = require("wibox")
     3→local watch = require("awful.widget.watch")
     4→local gears = require("gears")
     5→local lain = require("lain")
     6→local markup = lain.util.markup
     7→
     8→local crypto_text = wibox.widget.textbox()
     9→
    10→local function format_price(price)
    11→    local n = tonumber(price)
    12→    if not n then return "?" end
    13→    if n >= 1000 then
    14→        return string.format("%.1fk", n / 1000)
    15→    end
    16→    return string.format("%d", math.floor(n))
    17→end
    18→
    19→watch(
    20→    "curl -s --max-time 10 'https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=bitcoin,ethereum&vs_currencies=eur'",
    21→    300,
    22→    function(widget, stdout)
    23→        local btc = stdout:match('"bitcoin"%s*:%s*{%s*"eur"%s*:%s*([%d%.]+)')
    24→        local eth = stdout:match('"ethereum"%s*:%s*{%s*"eur"%s*:%s*([%d%.]+)')
    25→        local text
    26→        if btc and eth then
    27→            text = markup.fg.color(theme.fg_normal,
    28→                " ₿" .. format_price(btc) .. "  Ξ" .. format_price(eth) .. " ")
    29→        else
    30→            text = markup.fg.color(theme.fg_normal, " ₿?  Ξ? ")
    31→        end
    32→        widget:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, text))
    33→    end,
    34→    crypto_text

1→-- Coretemp (lain, average)
     2→local awful = require("awful")
     3→local wibox = require("wibox")
     4→local gears = require("gears")
     5→local lain = require("lain")
     6→local markup = lain.util.markup
     7→
     8→-- Function to auto-detect the first available temp*_input file
     9→local function find_temp_file()
    10→    local command = [[
    11→        for hwmon in /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon*; do
    12→            for temp in "$hwmon"/temp*_input; do
    13→                if [ -f "$temp" ]; then
    14→                    echo "$temp"
    15→                    exit 0
    16→                fi
    17→            done
    18→        done
    19→    ]]
    20→
    21→    -- Use awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell for async shell command
    22→    local handle = io.popen(command)
    23→    if handle then
    24→        local result = handle:read("*l")  -- Only read the first line
    25→        handle:close()
    26→        return result or nil
    27→    else
    28→        return nil
    29→    end
    30→end
    31→
    32→-- Get temperature file path
    33→local temp_file = find_temp_file() or "/dev/null"
    34→
    35→-- Create the widget
    36→theme.widget_temp = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/temp.png"
    37→local temp_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_temp)
    38→
    39→local temp = lain.widget.temp({
    40→    tempfiles = { temp_file },
    41→    timeout = 10,
    42→    settings = function()
    43→        local temp_str = "N/A"
    44→        if CORETEMP_NOW ~= "N/A" then
    45→            temp_str = string.format("%.0f", CORETEMP_NOW)
    46→        end
    47→        WIDGET:set_markup(
    48→            markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. temp_str .. "° "))
    49→        )
    50→    end,
    51→})
    52→
    53→local temp_widget = wibox.container.background(
    54→    wibox.container.margin(
    55→        wibox.widget({ temp_icon, temp.widget, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }),
    56→        2, 2
    57→    ),
    58→    "#425047",
    59→    gears.shape.rounded_rect
    60→)
    61→
    62→return temp_widget
    63→

1→-------------------------------------------------
     2→-- Net Speed Widget for Awesome Window Manager
     3→-- Shows current upload/download speed
     4→-- More details could be found here:
     5→-- https://github.com/streetturtle/awesome-wm-widgets/tree/master/net-speed-widget
     6→
     7→-- @author Pavel Makhov
     8→-- @copyright 2020 Pavel Makhov
     9→-------------------------------------------------
    10→
    11→local watch = require("awful.widget.watch")
    12→local wibox = require("wibox")
    13→local beautiful = require("beautiful")
    14→local markup = require("lain.util.markup")
    15→
    16→local HOME_DIR = os.getenv("HOME")
    17→local WIDGET_DIR = HOME_DIR .. "/.config/awesome/widgets/net_speed_widget/"
    18→local ICONS_DIR = WIDGET_DIR .. "icons/"
    19→
    20→local net_speed_widget = {}
    21→
    22→local function convert_to_h(bytes)
    23→	local speed
    24→	local dim
    25→	local bits = bytes * 8
    26→	if bits < 1000 then
    27→		speed = bits
    28→		dim = "b/s"
    29→	elseif bits < 1000000 then
    30→		speed = bits / 1000
    31→		dim = "kb/s"
    32→	elseif bits < 1000000000 then
    33→		speed = bits / 1000000
    34→		dim = "Mb/s"
    35→	elseif bits < 1000000000000 then
    36→		speed = bits / 1000000000
    37→		dim = "Gb/s"
    38→	else
    39→		speed = tonumber(bits)
    40→		dim = "b/s"
    41→	end
    42→	return math.floor(speed + 0.5) .. " " .. dim
    43→end
    44→
    45→local function split(string_to_split, separator)
    46→	if separator == nil then
    47→		separator = "%s"
    48→	end
    49→	local t = {}
    50→
    51→	for str in string.gmatch(string_to_split, "([^" .. separator .. "]+)") do
    52→		table.insert(t, str)
    53→	end
    54→
    55→	return t
    56→end
    57→
    58→local function worker(user_args)
    59→	local args = user_args or {}
    60→
    61→	local interface = args.interface or "*"
    62→	local timeout = args.timeout or 2
    63→	local width = args.width or 55
    64→
    65→	net_speed_widget = wibox.widget({
    66→		{
    67→			id = "rx_speed",
    68→			forced_width = width,
    69→			align = "right",
    70→			widget = wibox.widget.textbox,
    71→			bg = "#FFFF00",
    72→		},
    73→		{
    74→			image = ICONS_DIR .. "down.svg",
    75→			widget = wibox.widget.imagebox,
    76→			bg = "#FFFF00",
    77→		},
    78→		{
    79→			image = ICONS_DIR .. "up.svg",
    80→			widget = wibox.widget.imagebox,
    81→			bg = "#FFFF00",
    82→		},
    83→		{
    84→			id = "tx_speed",
    85→			forced_width = width,
    86→			align = "left",
    87→			widget = wibox.widget.textbox,
    88→			bg = "#FFFF00",
    89→		},
    90→		layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
    91→		set_rx_text = function(self, new_rx_speed)
    92→			self:get_children_by_id("rx_speed")[1]:set_markup(markup.font(beautiful.font, markup.fg.color(beautiful.fg_normal, tostring(new_rx_speed))))
    93→		end,
    94→		set_tx_text = function(self, new_tx_speed)
    95→			self:get_children_by_id("tx_speed")[1]:set_markup(markup.font(beautiful.font, markup.fg.color(beautiful.fg_normal, tostring(new_tx_speed))))
    96→		end,
    97→	})
    98→
    99→	-- make sure these are not shared across different worker/widgets (e.g. two monitors)
   100→	-- otherwise the speed will be randomly split among the worker in each monitor
   101→	local prev_rx = 0
   102→	local prev_tx = 0
   103→
   104→	local update_widget = function(widget, stdout)
   105→		local cur_vals = split(stdout, "\r\n")
   106→
   107→		local cur_rx = 0
   108→		local cur_tx = 0
   109→
   110→		for i, v in ipairs(cur_vals) do
   111→			if i % 2 == 1 then
   112→				cur_rx = cur_rx + v
   113→			end
   114→			if i % 2 == 0 then
   115→				cur_tx = cur_tx + v
   116→			end
   117→		end
   118→
   119→		local speed_rx = (cur_rx - prev_rx) / timeout
   120→		local speed_tx = (cur_tx - prev_tx) / timeout
   121→
   122→		widget:set_rx_text(convert_to_h(speed_rx))
   123→		widget:set_tx_text(convert_to_h(speed_tx))
   124→
   125→		prev_rx = cur_rx
   126→		prev_tx = cur_tx
   127→	end
   128→
   129→	watch(
   130→		string.format([[bash -c "cat /sys/class/net/%s/statistics/*_bytes"]], interface),
   131→		timeout,
   132→		update_widget,
   133→		net_speed_widget
   134→	)
   135→
   136→	return net_speed_widget
   137→end
   138→
   139→return setmetatable(net_speed_widget, {
   140→	__call = function(_, ...)
   141→		return worker(...)
   142→	end,
   143→})
   144→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→
     3→check_and_start() {
     4→  local process_name=$1
     5→  local command=$2
     6→
     7→  echo "Checking process: $process_name"
     8→
     9→  if pgrep -x "$process_name" >/dev/null; then
    10→    echo "Process $process_name is running."
    11→    if ! wmctrl -xa "$process_name"; then
    12→      echo "Window for $process_name not found. Starting new instance."
    13→      "$command" &
    14→    else
    15→      echo "Window for $process_name brought to foreground."
    16→    fi
    17→  else
    18→    echo "Process $process_name is not running. Starting new instance."
    19→    "$command" &
    20→  fi
    21→}
    22→
    23→
    24→pgrep -x greenclip > /dev/null || greenclip daemon &
    25→
    26→declare -A processes=(
    27→  ["Brave-browser"]="Brave-browser"
    28→  ["bruno"]="bruno"
    29→  ["kitty"]="kitty"
    30→  ["slack"]="slack"
    31→  ["obsidian"]="obsidian"
    32→  ["jetbrains-rubymine"]="jetbrains-rubymine"
    33→)
    34→
    35→for process_name in "${!processes[@]}"; do
    36→  command=${processes[$process_name]}
    37→  check_and_start "$process_name" "$command"
    38→done
    39→

10. **Crypto Widget** - Bitcoin & Ethereum prices in EUR (updates every 5 mins from CoinGecko API)
11. **Clock Widget** - Date/time with popup calendar on hover
12. **Layout Box** - Current layout indicator with click to cycle layouts

**Styling:**
- Height: 16px
- Transparent background (`#00000000`)
- Widgets have rounded rect backgrounds (`#425047` - Everforest green-bg)
- Separator text boxes between widgets for spacing
- Font: Meslo LGS Regular 10pt

---

### 3. Notification (Naughty) Configuration

**Location**: `/home/tymoyato/.dotfiles/dotfiles/awesome/rc.lua` (lines 129-143)

Key notification settings:

naughty.config.defaults.timeout = 5          -- 5 second display time
naughty.config.defaults.screen = 1           -- Show on first screen
naughty.config.defaults.position = "top_right" -- Top-right corner

### 4. Custom Widgets

**Location**: `/home/tymoyato/.dotfiles/dotfiles/awesome/themes/everforest/widgets_config/`

| Widget | File | Update Interval | Details |
|--------|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Clock** | `clock_widget.lua` | Continuous | Date/time format: `%a %d %b %H:%M`, popup calendar on hover |
| **Battery** | `battery_widget.lua` | 30s | Lain widget, monitors `BAT0`, notifications at 5% & 15% |
| **CPU** | `cpu_widget.lua` | 5s | Lain widget, displays usage % |
| **Memory** | `mem_widget.lua` | 5s | Lain widget, shows MB used + percentage |
| **Temperature** | `temp_widget.lua` | 10s | Auto-detects `/sys/class/hwmon/` temp files, averages core temps |
| **Volume** | `volume_widget.lua` | Dynamic | Lain ALSA widget, mouse wheel scroll to adjust, right-click to mute, middle-click sets to 100% |

**Styling Pattern**: Most widgets use:
- `wibox.container.background()` with background color `#425047` and `gears.shape.rounded_rect`
- `wibox.container.margin()` for padding

| **Red** | `#E67E80` | Urgent/warning states |
| **Yellow** | `#DBBC7F` | Secondary accent |
| **Blue** | `#7FBBB3` | UI elements |
| **Orange** | `#E69875` | Warnings (medium battery) |
| **Purple** | `#D699B6` | Additional accent |
| **Aqua** | `#83C092` | Alt accent |
| **BG Normal** | `#2D353B` | Main background |
| **FG Normal** | `#D3C6AA` | Main text color |
| **BG Green** | `#425047` | Widget backgrounds |
| **BG Dim** | `#232A2E` | Darker background |

**Key Theme Properties**:
```lua
theme.wallpaper = "#A7C080"              -- Solid color instead of image
theme.font = "Meslo LGS Regular 10"      -- Main font
theme.useless_gap = 6                    -- Gap between windows
theme.border_width = 0                   -- No window borders
theme.notification_shape = gears.shape.infobubble
```

**Tag/Tasklist Colors**:
- Focus: Green background (`#425047`)
- Occupied: Dark blue background with green text
- Empty: Grey background with grey text
- Urgent: Red background with red text

---

### 6. Key Configuration Details

**Layouts** (rc.lua line 241):
1. Tile (default)
2. Floating
3. Max
4. Centerwork (Lain)
5. Spiral
6. Magnifier
7. Fair

**Tags**: 9 total tags with names "1" through "9"

**Key Bindings** (See rc.lua lines 2-74 for full reference):
- `MODKEY + t`: Switch themes (cycles: everforest → kitay → cccp → everforest)
- `MODKEY + Shift + =/-`: Volume up/down
- `MODKEY + Alt + space/Left/Right`: Music controls (play-pause, prev, next)
- `MODKEY + b`: Toggle wibar visibility
- `MODKEY + Ctrl + x`: Lock screen (i3lock-fancy)

**Startup Applications** (rc.lua lines 228-230):
- Picom (compositor)
- Brave browser with remote debugging
- Custom app launcher (`~/.config/awesome/utils/apps.sh`)
- Display setup script

**Tag Auto-assignment Rules** (rc.lua lines 706-715):
- kitty → tag "1"
- obsidian → tag "2"
- Brave-browser → tag "3"
- bruno (API client) → tag "4"
- firefox → tag "5"
- Slack → tag "6"

---

### 7. Additional Features

**Theme Switching**: 
- Saves current theme index to `/tmp/awesome_current_theme`
- Preserves tag position across restart
- Uses flag files for restart type detection

**Lain Library Widgets Available** (not all used):
- ALSA/PulseAudio audio widgets
- Battery widget
- CPU widget
- Memory widget
- Temperature widget
- Weather widget
- Network widget
- MPD music player widget
- And more...

**Freedesktop Integration**: Menu system integrates with XDG desktop entries for application launcher

This is a well-organized, modern AwesomeWM configuration with comprehensive system monitoring widgets, theme switching capability, and a clean Everforest color scheme.

-- {{{ Variable definitions
-- Themes define colours, icons, font and wallpapers.
local themes = {
  "everforest",
	"kitay",
	"cccp",
}
local i3lock_settings = "/home/tymoyato/.config/awesome/i3lock-fancy"
-- Try to read saved theme index from file
local current_theme_index = 1
local theme_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_theme", "r")
if theme_file then
	local saved_index = tonumber(theme_file:read("*line"))
	if saved_index and saved_index >= 1 and saved_index <= #themes then
		current_theme_index = saved_index
	end
	theme_file:close()
end

local chosen_theme = themes[current_theme_index]

local function switch_theme()
	current_theme_index = current_theme_index % #themes + 1
	chosen_theme = themes[current_theme_index]

	-- Save current tag state
	local current_tag = awful.screen.focused().selected_tag
	local current_tag_index = current_tag and current_tag.index or 1

	-- Show notification before restart
	naughty.notify({
		title = "Theme Changed",
		text = "Switching to " .. chosen_theme .. " theme...",
		timeout = 1,
	})

	-- Save current theme index and tag to temporary files
	local theme_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_theme", "w")
	if theme_file then
		theme_file:write(current_theme_index)
		theme_file:close()
	end

	local tag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_current_tag", "w")
	if tag_file then
		tag_file:write(current_tag_index)
		tag_file:close()
	end

	-- Create a flag file to indicate this is a theme switch restart
	local flag_file = io.open("/tmp/awesome_theme_switch", "w")
	if flag_file then
		flag_file:write("1")
		flag_file:close()
	end

	-- Restart awesome to apply theme change
	awesome.restart()
end

local theme_path = string.format("%s/.config/awesome/themes/%s/theme.lua", os.getenv("HOME"), chosen_theme)
beautiful.init(theme_path)

"/icons/widgets/clock.png" local clock_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_clock) local clock = awful.widget.textclock(' %a %d %b %H:%M ') local clock_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin(wibox.widget({ clock_icon, clock, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }), 2, 2), "#425047", gears.shape.rounded_rect ) -- Everforest colors local everforest_bg = "#2D353B" local everforest_green = "#A7C080" local everforest_fg = "#D3C6AA" local everforest_bg_green = "#425047" -- Graphical Calendar Popup with Everforest theme local cal_popup = calendar_popup({ start_sunday = false, spacing = 10, style_month = { border_width = 2, border_color = everforest_green, padding = 8, bg_color = everforest_bg, fg_color = everforest_fg, }, style_header = { fg_color = everforest_green, font = "Meslo LGS Regular 12", bg_color = everforest_bg }, style_weekday = { fg_color = everforest_green, font = "Meslo LGS Regular 10", bg_color = everforest_bg }, style_focus = { fg_color = everforest_bg, bg_color = everforest_green, markup = true }, style_normal = { fg_color = everforest_fg, bg_color = everforest_bg }, long_weekdays = true, }) -- Show on hover clock_widget:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() cal_popup:attach(clock_widget, "tr", { on_hover = true }) end) clock_widget:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() cal_popup.visible = false end) return clock_widget

-- CPU
local wibox = require("wibox")
local lain = require("lain")
local markup = lain.util.markup
local gears = require("gears")

theme.widget_cpu = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/cpu.png"
local cpu_icon = wibox.widget.imagebox(theme.widget_cpu)
local cpu = lain.widget.cpu({
	timeout = 5,
	settings = function()
		widget:set_markup(markup.font(theme.font, markup.fg.color("#D3C6AA", " " .. cpu_now.usage .. "% ")))
	end,
})
local cpu_widget = wibox.container.background(
	wibox.container.margin(wibox.widget({ cpu_icon, cpu.widget, layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal }), 2, 2),
	"#425047",
	gears.shape.rounded_rect
)

return cpu_widget

theme.tasklist_disable_icon = true
theme.useless_gap = 6

theme.titlebar_close_button_focus = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/close_focus.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_inactive.png"

-- Everforest colors
theme.green = "#A7C080"         -- green
theme.red = "#E67E80"           -- red
theme.yellow = "#DBBC7F"        -- yellow
theme.blue = "#7FBBB3"          -- blue
theme.orange = "#E69875"        -- orange
theme.purple = "#D699B6"        -- purple
theme.aqua = "#83C092"          -- aqua
theme.grey0 = "#7A8478"         -- grey0
theme.grey1 = "#859289"         -- grey1
theme.grey2 = "#9DA9A0"         -- grey2
theme.bg_dim = "#232A2E"        -- bg_dim
theme.bg_visual = "#543A48"     -- bg_visual
theme.black = theme.bg_normal

-- Panel
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Widgets --
local clock_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.clock_widget")
local battery_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.battery_widget")
local mem_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.mem_widget")
local cpu_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.cpu_widget")
local temp_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.temp_widget")
local volume_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.volume_widget")
local kbd_widget = require("widgets.kbd_widget.kbd_widget")
local brightness_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.brightness_widget")
local music_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.music_widget")
local crypto_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.crypto_widget")

function theme.connect(s)
    -- Quake application
    s.quake = lain.util.quake({ app = awful.util.terminal })

    -- Set solid color wallpaper
    gears.wallpaper.set(theme.wallpaper)

    -- Tags
    layout = {
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[5],
    }
    awful.tag({ "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9" }, s, layout)

    -- Promptbox
    s.mypromptbox = awful.widget.prompt()

    -- Layoutbox
    s.mylayoutbox = awful.widget.layoutbox(s)
    s.mylayoutbox:buttons(awful.util.table.join(
        awful.button({}, 1, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 3, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end),
        awful.button({}, 4, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 5, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end)
    ))

    -- Taglist
    s.mytaglist = awful.widget.taglist(s, awful.widget.taglist.filter.all, awful.util.taglist_buttons)

    -- Wibar
    s.mywibox = awful.wibar({ position = "top", screen = s, height = 16, bg = "#00000000", fg = theme.fg_focus })

input.content: -- Notification history widget -- Left-click: show history popup -- Right-click: clear all notifications local wibox = require("wibox") local awful = require("awful") local gears = require("gears") local naughty = require("naughty") -- Everforest colors local bg_widget = "#425047" local bg_popup = "#2D353B" local bg_latest = "#374247" local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" local fg_green = "#A7C080" local fg_grey = "#7A8478" local MAX_HISTORY = 20 local history = {} local popup = nil -- Label showing the last notification text local notif_label = wibox.widget.textbox() local function set_label(text) notif_label:set_markup( string.format(' %s ', fg_color, text) ) end set_label("no notifications") -- Bell icon label local bell_label = wibox.widget.textbox() bell_label:set_markup( string.format(' ● ', fg_green) ) local notif_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget({ bell_label, notif_label, layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal }), 2, 2 ), bg_widget, gears.shape.rounded_rect ) -- Close the history popup local function close_popup() if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end end -- Update wibar label from history local function refresh_label() if #history == 0 then set_label("no notifications") else local n = history[#history] local text = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message if #text > 45 then text = text:sub(1, 42) .. "..." end set_label(gears.string.xml_escape(text)) end end -- Intercept every new notification and save to history naughty.connect_signal("added", function(n) table.insert(history, { title = n.title or "", message = n.message or n.text or "", time = os.date("%H:%M"), }) if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end refresh_label() end) -- Build and show the history popup above the wibar (anchored top-right) local function show_popup() close_popup() if #history == 0 then return end local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( ' Notification history ', fg_green ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = 4, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }) -- Separator rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, span_ratio = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) -- Notification rows (newest first) for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( '%s' .. ' %s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = { top = 3, bottom = 3, left = 6, right = 6 }, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, }) end popup = awful.popup { widget = { rows, widget = wibox.container.background, bg = bg_popup, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 1, border_color = fg_grey, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 320, maximum_width = 520, } -- Click anywhere on the popup to close popup:connect_signal("button::press", function() close_popup() end) -- Close when mouse leaves the popup popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() close_popup() end) end -- Button bindings notif_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() -- left-click: toggle popup if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() -- right-click: clear all history = {} close_popup() refresh_label() end) )) return notif_widget

local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local awful = require("awful")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local os, math, string = os, math, string

theme = {}
theme.dir = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/.config/awesome/themes/everforest"
theme.wallpaper = "#A7C080" -- Solid color background
theme.font = "Meslo LGS Regular 10"

theme.yellow = "#DBBC7F"        -- yellow
theme.blue = "#7FBBB3"          -- blue
theme.orange = "#E69875"        -- orange
theme.purple = "#D699B6"        -- purple
theme.aqua = "#83C092"          -- aqua
theme.grey0 = "#7A8478"         -- grey0
theme.grey1 = "#859289"         -- grey1
theme.grey2 = "#9DA9A0"         -- grey2
theme.bg_dim = "#232A2E"        -- bg_dim
theme.bg_visual = "#543A48"     -- bg_visual
theme.black = theme.bg_normal

-- Panel
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Widgets --
local clock_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.clock_widget")
local battery_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.battery_widget")
local mem_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.mem_widget")
local cpu_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.cpu_widget")
local temp_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.temp_widget")
local volume_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.volume_widget")
local kbd_widget = require("widgets.kbd_widget.kbd_widget")
local brightness_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.brightness_widget")
local music_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.music_widget")
local crypto_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.crypto_widget")

function theme.connect(s)
    -- Quake application
    s.quake = lain.util.quake({ app = awful.util.terminal })

    -- Set solid color wallpaper
    gears.wallpaper.set(theme.wallpaper)

    -- Tags
    layout = {
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[5],
    }
    awful.tag({ "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9" }, s, layout)

    -- Promptbox
    s.mypromptbox = awful.widget.prompt()

    -- Layoutbox
    s.mylayoutbox = awful.widget.layoutbox(s)
    s.mylayoutbox:buttons(awful.util.table.join(
        awful.button({}, 1, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 3, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end),
        awful.button({}, 4, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 5, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end)
    ))

    -- Taglist
    s.mytaglist = awful.widget.taglist(s, awful.widget.taglist.filter.all, awful.util.taglist_buttons)

    -- Wibar
    s.mywibox = awful.wibar({ position = "top", screen = s, height = 16, bg = "#00000000", fg = theme.fg_focus })
    local net_speed_widget = require("widgets.net_speed_widget.net_speed")

    -- Setup
    s.mywibox:setup({
        layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
        { -- Left
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            s.mytaglist,
            s.mypromptbox,
        },
        { -- Middle (empty for now)
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
        },
        { -- Right
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            music_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            wibox.container.background(
                wibox.container.margin(net_speed_widget(), 2, 2),
                "#425047",
                gears.shape.rounded_rect
            ),
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            kbd_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            brightness_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            volume_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            temp_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            cpu_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            mem_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            battery_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            crypto_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            clock_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            s.mylayoutbox,
        },
    })
end

return theme

    awful.tag({ "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9" }, s, layout)

    -- Promptbox
    s.mypromptbox = awful.widget.prompt()

    -- Layoutbox
    s.mylayoutbox = awful.widget.layoutbox(s)
    s.mylayoutbox:buttons(awful.util.table.join(
        awful.button({}, 1, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 3, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end),
        awful.button({}, 4, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 5, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end)
    ))

    -- Taglist
    s.mytaglist = awful.widget.taglist(s, awful.widget.taglist.filter.all, awful.util.taglist_buttons)

    -- Wibar
    s.mywibox = awful.wibar({ position = "top", screen = s, height = 16, bg = "#00000000", fg = theme.fg_focus })
    local net_speed_widget = require("widgets.net_speed_widget.net_speed")

    -- Setup
    s.mywibox:setup({
        layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
        { -- Left
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            s.mytaglist,
            s.mypromptbox,
        },
        { -- Middle (empty for now)
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
        },
        { -- Right
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            music_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            wibox.container.background(
                wibox.container.margin(net_speed_widget(), 2, 2),
                "#425047",
                gears.shape.rounded_rect
            ),
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            kbd_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            brightness_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            volume_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            temp_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            cpu_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            mem_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            battery_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            crypto_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            clock_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            s.mylayoutbox,
        },
    })
end

return theme

content.text:
Done. Here's what was added:

**`notif_widget.lua`** — a new widget with:
- **Wibar label**: shows `● <title>: <message>` of the most recent notification (truncated to 45 chars). Defaults to `● no notifications`.
- **Left-click**: toggles a floating popup listing all notifications newest-first, with timestamps. The most recent entry is highlighted. Popup closes on click or mouse leave.
- **Right-click**: clears history and resets the label.
- Uses `naughty.connect_signal("added", ...)` to capture every notification automatically.

The widget is placed at the **left edge of the right section** in the wibar (before the music widget). You can move it by editing the position in `theme.lua:184`.

To apply: `Mod4 + Ctrl + r` (or however you reload awesome in your config).

Can you share the error messages? You can check the AwesomeWM log with:

```
! cat ~/.xsession-errors | tail -50
```

or if you see the error notification on screen, paste it here.

-- Standard awesome library
local gears = require("gears")
local awful = require("awful")
require("awful.autofocus")
-- Widget and layout library
local wibox = require("wibox")
-- Theme handling library
local beautiful = require("beautiful")
-- Notification library
local naughty = require("naughty")
local menubar = require("menubar")
local hotkeys_popup = require("awful.hotkeys_popup")
-- Enable hotkeys help widget for VIM and other apps
-- when client with a matching name is opened:
require("awful.hotkeys_popup.keys")

-- Load Debian menu entries
-- local debian = require("debian.menu")
local has_fdo, freedesktop = pcall(require, "freedesktop")
local lain = require("lain")
-- local scratch = require("scratch")

-- {{{ Error handling
if awesome.startup_errors then
	naughty.notify({
		preset = naughty.config.presets.critical,
		title = "Oops, there were errors during startup!",
		text = awesome.startup_errors,
	})
end

file.content: -- Notification history widget -- Left-click: show history popup -- Right-click: clear all notifications local wibox = require("wibox") local awful = require("awful") local gears = require("gears") local naughty = require("naughty") -- Everforest colors local bg_widget = "#425047" local bg_popup = "#2D353B" local bg_latest = "#374247" local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" local fg_green = "#A7C080" local fg_grey = "#7A8478" local MAX_HISTORY = 20 local history = {} local popup = nil -- Label showing the last notification text local notif_label = wibox.widget.textbox() local function set_label(text) notif_label:set_markup( string.format(' %s ', fg_color, text) ) end set_label("no notifications") -- Bell icon label local bell_label = wibox.widget.textbox() bell_label:set_markup( string.format(' ● ', fg_green) ) local notif_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget({ bell_label, notif_label, layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal }), 2, 2 ), bg_widget, gears.shape.rounded_rect ) -- Close the history popup local function close_popup() if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end end -- Update wibar label from history local function refresh_label() if #history == 0 then set_label("no notifications") else local n = history[#history] local text = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message if #text > 45 then text = text:sub(1, 42) .. "..." end set_label(gears.string.xml_escape(text)) end end -- Intercept every new notification and save to history naughty.connect_signal("added", function(n) table.insert(history, { title = n.title or "", message = n.message or n.text or "", time = os.date("%H:%M"), }) if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end refresh_label() end) -- Build and show the history popup above the wibar (anchored top-right) local function show_popup() close_popup() if #history == 0 then return end local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( ' Notification history ', fg_green ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = 4, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }) -- Separator rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, span_ratio = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) -- Notification rows (newest first) for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( '%s' .. ' %s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = { top = 3, bottom = 3, left = 6, right = 6 }, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, }) end popup = awful.popup { widget = { rows, widget = wibox.container.background, bg = bg_popup, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 1, border_color = fg_grey, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 320, maximum_width = 520, } -- Click anywhere on the popup to close popup:connect_signal("button::press", function() close_popup() end) -- Close when mouse leaves the popup popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() close_popup() end) end -- Button bindings notif_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() -- left-click: toggle popup if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() -- right-click: clear all history = {} close_popup() refresh_label() end) )) return notif_widget

input.new_string:
-- Intercept naughty.notify to capture notifications (legacy naughty API)
local _orig_notify = naughty.notify
naughty.notify = function(args)
    local title   = (args and args.title) or ""
    local message = (args and (args.text or args.message)) or ""
    if title ~= "" or message ~= "" then
        table.insert(history, {
            title   = title,
            message = message,
            time    = os.date("%H:%M"),
        })
        if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end
        refresh_label()
    end
    return _orig_notify(args)
end

content.text:
Loads clean. Reload awesome with `Mod4 + Ctrl + r` to apply.

The fix: the installed awesome 4.3 uses the **legacy** naughty API which has no `connect_signal`. The widget now wraps `naughty.notify` directly to intercept notifications instead.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local awful = require("awful")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local os, math, string = os, math, string

theme = {}
theme.dir = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/.config/awesome/themes/everforest"
theme.wallpaper = "#A7C080" -- Solid color background
theme.font = "Meslo LGS Regular 10"
theme.taglist_font = "Meslo LGS Bold 10"
theme.tasklist_font = "Terminus 10"

-- Everforest color scheme (Dark Medium Contrast)
theme.bg_normal = "#2D353B"     -- bg0
theme.fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg
theme.bg_focus = "#425047"      -- bg_green
theme.fg_focus = "#A7C080"      -- green
theme.bg_urgent = "#514045"     -- bg_red
theme.fg_urgent = "#E67E80"     -- red

theme.fg_widget = "#A7C080"     -- green

-- Taglist colors with Everforest theme
theme.taglist_bg_focus = "#425047"      -- bg_green
theme.taglist_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"      -- fg
theme.taglist_bg_occupied = "#3D484D"   -- bg2
theme.taglist_fg_occupied = "#A7C080"   -- green
theme.taglist_bg_empty = "#475258"      -- bg3
theme.taglist_fg_empty = "#859289"      -- grey1
theme.taglist_bg_urgent = "#514045"     -- bg_red
theme.taglist_fg_urgent = "#E67E80"     -- red
theme.taglist_shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect

-- Tasklist colors
theme.tasklist_bg_normal = "#2D353B"    -- bg0
theme.tasklist_fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"    -- fg
theme.tasklist_bg_focus = "#425047"     -- bg_green
theme.tasklist_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg
theme.tasklist_bg_urgent = "#514045"    -- bg_red
theme.tasklist_fg_urgent = "#E67E80"    -- red

theme.border_width = 0
theme.border_normal = "#3D484D"         -- bg2
theme.border_focus = "#A7C080"          -- green
theme.border_marked = "#E69875"         -- orange

theme.titlebar_bg_normal = "#3D484D"    -- bg2
theme.titlebar_fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"    -- fg

theme.titlebar_bg_focus = "#425047"     -- bg_green
theme.titlebar_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg

theme.menu_height = 16
theme.menu_width = 140

theme.notification_font = "Meslo LGS Regular 12"
theme.notification_bg = theme.bg_normal
theme.notification_fg = theme.fg_normal
theme.notification_border_width = 0
theme.notification_border_color = theme.bg_normal
theme.notification_shape = gears.shape.infobubble
theme.notification_opacity = 1
theme.notification_margin = 30

theme.menu_submenu_icon = theme.dir .. "/icons/submenu.png"

-- Layout icons
theme.layout_tile = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tile.png"
theme.layout_tileleft = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tileleft.png"
theme.layout_tilebottom = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tilebottom.png"
theme.layout_tiletop = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tiletop.png"
theme.layout_fairv = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fairv.png"
theme.layout_fairh = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fairh.png"
theme.layout_spiral = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/spiral.png"
theme.layout_centerwork = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/centerwork.png"
theme.layout_dwindle = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/dwindle.png"
theme.layout_max = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/max.png"
theme.layout_fullscreen = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fullscreen.png"
theme.layout_magnifier = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/magnifier.png"
theme.layout_floating = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/floating.png"

-- Widget icons
theme.widget_music = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/note.png"
theme.widget_music_on = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/note_on.png"
theme.widget_music_pause = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/pause.png"
theme.widget_music_stop = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/stop.png"

theme.tasklist_plain_task_name = true
theme.tasklist_disable_icon = true
theme.useless_gap = 6

theme.titlebar_close_button_focus = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/close_focus.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_inactive.png"

-- Everforest colors
theme.green = "#A7C080"         -- green
theme.red = "#E67E80"           -- red
theme.yellow = "#DBBC7F"        -- yellow
theme.blue = "#7FBBB3"          -- blue
theme.orange = "#E69875"        -- orange
theme.purple = "#D699B6"        -- purple
theme.aqua = "#83C092"          -- aqua
theme.grey0 = "#7A8478"         -- grey0
theme.grey1 = "#859289"         -- grey1
theme.grey2 = "#9DA9A0"         -- grey2
theme.bg_dim = "#232A2E"        -- bg_dim
theme.bg_visual = "#543A48"     -- bg_visual
theme.black = theme.bg_normal

-- Panel
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Widgets --
local clock_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.clock_widget")
local battery_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.battery_widget")
local mem_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.mem_widget")
local cpu_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.cpu_widget")
local temp_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.temp_widget")
local volume_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.volume_widget")
local kbd_widget = require("widgets.kbd_widget.kbd_widget")
local brightness_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.brightness_widget")
local music_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.music_widget")
local crypto_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.crypto_widget")
local notif_widget  = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.notif_widget")

function theme.connect(s)
    -- Quake application
    s.quake = lain.util.quake({ app = awful.util.terminal })

    -- Set solid color wallpaper
    gears.wallpaper.set(theme.wallpaper)

    -- Tags
    layout = {
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[5],
    }
    awful.tag({ "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9" }, s, layout)

    -- Promptbox
    s.mypromptbox = awful.widget.prompt()

    -- Layoutbox
    s.mylayoutbox = awful.widget.layoutbox(s)
    s.mylayoutbox:buttons(awful.util.table.join(
        awful.button({}, 1, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 3, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end),
        awful.button({}, 4, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 5, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end)
    ))

    -- Taglist
    s.mytaglist = awful.widget.taglist(s, awful.widget.taglist.filter.all, awful.util.taglist_buttons)

    -- Wibar
    s.mywibox = awful.wibar({ position = "top", screen = s, height = 16, bg = "#00000000", fg = theme.fg_focus })
    local net_speed_widget = require("widgets.net_speed_widget.net_speed")

    -- Setup
    s.mywibox:setup({
        layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,

local gears = require("gears")
local lain = require("lain")
local awful = require("awful")
local wibox = require("wibox")
local os, math, string = os, math, string

theme = {}
theme.dir = os.getenv("HOME") .. "/.config/awesome/themes/everforest"
theme.wallpaper = "#A7C080" -- Solid color background
theme.font = "Meslo LGS Regular 10"
theme.taglist_font = "Meslo LGS Bold 10"
theme.tasklist_font = "Terminus 10"

-- Everforest color scheme (Dark Medium Contrast)
theme.bg_normal = "#2D353B"     -- bg0
theme.fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg
theme.bg_focus = "#425047"      -- bg_green
theme.fg_focus = "#A7C080"      -- green
theme.bg_urgent = "#514045"     -- bg_red
theme.fg_urgent = "#E67E80"     -- red

theme.fg_widget = "#A7C080"     -- green

-- Taglist colors with Everforest theme
theme.taglist_bg_focus = "#425047"      -- bg_green
theme.taglist_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"      -- fg
theme.taglist_bg_occupied = "#3D484D"   -- bg2
theme.taglist_fg_occupied = "#A7C080"   -- green
theme.taglist_bg_empty = "#475258"      -- bg3
theme.taglist_fg_empty = "#859289"      -- grey1
theme.taglist_bg_urgent = "#514045"     -- bg_red
theme.taglist_fg_urgent = "#E67E80"     -- red
theme.taglist_shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect

-- Tasklist colors
theme.tasklist_bg_normal = "#2D353B"    -- bg0
theme.tasklist_fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"    -- fg
theme.tasklist_bg_focus = "#425047"     -- bg_green
theme.tasklist_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg
theme.tasklist_bg_urgent = "#514045"    -- bg_red
theme.tasklist_fg_urgent = "#E67E80"    -- red

theme.border_width = 0
theme.border_normal = "#3D484D"         -- bg2
theme.border_focus = "#A7C080"          -- green
theme.border_marked = "#E69875"         -- orange

theme.titlebar_bg_normal = "#3D484D"    -- bg2
theme.titlebar_fg_normal = "#D3C6AA"    -- fg

theme.titlebar_bg_focus = "#425047"     -- bg_green
theme.titlebar_fg_focus = "#D3C6AA"     -- fg

theme.menu_height = 16
theme.menu_width = 140

theme.notification_font = "Meslo LGS Regular 12"
theme.notification_bg = theme.bg_normal
theme.notification_fg = theme.fg_normal
theme.notification_border_width = 0
theme.notification_border_color = theme.bg_normal
theme.notification_shape = gears.shape.infobubble
theme.notification_opacity = 1
theme.notification_margin = 30

theme.menu_submenu_icon = theme.dir .. "/icons/submenu.png"

-- Layout icons
theme.layout_tile = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tile.png"
theme.layout_tileleft = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tileleft.png"
theme.layout_tilebottom = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tilebottom.png"
theme.layout_tiletop = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/tiletop.png"
theme.layout_fairv = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fairv.png"
theme.layout_fairh = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fairh.png"
theme.layout_spiral = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/spiral.png"
theme.layout_centerwork = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/centerwork.png"
theme.layout_dwindle = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/dwindle.png"
theme.layout_max = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/max.png"
theme.layout_fullscreen = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/fullscreen.png"
theme.layout_magnifier = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/magnifier.png"
theme.layout_floating = theme.dir .. "/icons/layouts/floating.png"

-- Widget icons
theme.widget_music = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/note.png"
theme.widget_music_on = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/note_on.png"
theme.widget_music_pause = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/pause.png"
theme.widget_music_stop = theme.dir .. "/icons/widgets/stop.png"

theme.tasklist_plain_task_name = true
theme.tasklist_disable_icon = true
theme.useless_gap = 6

theme.titlebar_close_button_focus = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/close_focus.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_ontop_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/ontop_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_sticky_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/sticky_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_floating_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/floating_focus_inactive.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_active = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_active.png"
theme.titlebar_maximized_button_focus_inactive = theme.dir .. "/icons/titlebar/maximized_focus_inactive.png"

-- Everforest colors
theme.green = "#A7C080"         -- green
theme.red = "#E67E80"           -- red
theme.yellow = "#DBBC7F"        -- yellow
theme.blue = "#7FBBB3"          -- blue
theme.orange = "#E69875"        -- orange
theme.purple = "#D699B6"        -- purple
theme.aqua = "#83C092"          -- aqua
theme.grey0 = "#7A8478"         -- grey0
theme.grey1 = "#859289"         -- grey1
theme.grey2 = "#9DA9A0"         -- grey2
theme.bg_dim = "#232A2E"        -- bg_dim
theme.bg_visual = "#543A48"     -- bg_visual
theme.black = theme.bg_normal

-- Panel
local markup = lain.util.markup

-- Widgets --
local clock_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.clock_widget")
local battery_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.battery_widget")
local mem_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.mem_widget")
local cpu_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.cpu_widget")
local temp_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.temp_widget")
local volume_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.volume_widget")
local kbd_widget = require("widgets.kbd_widget.kbd_widget")
local brightness_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.brightness_widget")
local music_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.music_widget")
local crypto_widget = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.crypto_widget")
local notif_widget  = require("themes.everforest.widgets_config.notif_widget")

function theme.connect(s)
    -- Quake application
    s.quake = lain.util.quake({ app = awful.util.terminal })

    -- Set solid color wallpaper
    gears.wallpaper.set(theme.wallpaper)

    -- Tags
    layout = {
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[1],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[3],
        awful.layout.layouts[5],
    }
    awful.tag({ "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9" }, s, layout)

    -- Promptbox
    s.mypromptbox = awful.widget.prompt()

    -- Layoutbox
    s.mylayoutbox = awful.widget.layoutbox(s)
    s.mylayoutbox:buttons(awful.util.table.join(
        awful.button({}, 1, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 3, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end),
        awful.button({}, 4, function() awful.layout.inc(1) end),
        awful.button({}, 5, function() awful.layout.inc(-1) end)
    ))

    -- Taglist
    s.mytaglist = awful.widget.taglist(s, awful.widget.taglist.filter.all, awful.util.taglist_buttons)

    -- Wibar
    s.mywibox = awful.wibar({ position = "top", screen = s, height = 16, bg = "#00000000", fg = theme.fg_focus })
    local net_speed_widget = require("widgets.net_speed_widget.net_speed")

    -- Setup
    s.mywibox:setup({
        layout = wibox.layout.align.horizontal,
        { -- Left
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            s.mytaglist,
            s.mypromptbox,
        },
        { -- Middle (empty for now)
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
        },
        { -- Right
            layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal,
            music_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            wibox.container.background(
                wibox.container.margin(net_speed_widget(), 2, 2),
                "#425047",
                gears.shape.rounded_rect
            ),
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            kbd_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            brightness_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            volume_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            temp_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            cpu_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            mem_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            battery_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            crypto_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            clock_widget,
            wibox.widget.textbox(" "),
            s.mylayoutbox,
        },
    })
end

return theme

-- Update wibar label from history
local function refresh_label()
    if #history == 0 then
        set_label("no notifications")
    else
        local n = history[#history]
        local text = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message
        if #text > 45 then text = text:sub(1, 42) .. "..." end
        set_label(gears.string.xml_escape(text))
    end
end

toolUseResult.originalFile: -- Notification history widget -- Left-click: show history popup -- Right-click: clear all notifications local wibox = require("wibox") local awful = require("awful") local gears = require("gears") local naughty = require("naughty") -- Everforest colors local bg_widget = "#425047" local bg_popup = "#2D353B" local bg_latest = "#374247" local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" local fg_green = "#A7C080" local fg_grey = "#7A8478" local MAX_HISTORY = 20 local history = {} local popup = nil -- Label showing the last notification text local notif_label = wibox.widget.textbox() local function set_label(text) notif_label:set_markup( string.format(' %s ', fg_color, text) ) end set_label("no notifications") -- Bell icon label local bell_label = wibox.widget.textbox() bell_label:set_markup( string.format(' ● ', fg_green) ) local notif_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget({ bell_label, notif_label, layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal }), 2, 2 ), bg_widget, gears.shape.rounded_rect ) -- Close the history popup local function close_popup() if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end end -- Update wibar label from history local function refresh_label() if #history == 0 then set_label("no notifications") else local n = history[#history] local text = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message if #text > 45 then text = text:sub(1, 42) .. "..." end set_label(gears.string.xml_escape(text)) end end -- Intercept naughty.notify to capture notifications (legacy naughty API) local _orig_notify = naughty.notify naughty.notify = function(args) local title = (args and args.title) or "" local message = (args and (args.text or args.message)) or "" if title ~= "" or message ~= "" then table.insert(history, { title = title, message = message, time = os.date("%H:%M"), }) if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end refresh_label() end return _orig_notify(args) end -- Build and show the history popup above the wibar (anchored top-right) local function show_popup() close_popup() if #history == 0 then return end local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( ' Notification history ', fg_green ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = 4, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }) -- Separator rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, span_ratio = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) -- Notification rows (newest first) for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( '%s' .. ' %s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = { top = 3, bottom = 3, left = 6, right = 6 }, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, }) end popup = awful.popup { widget = { rows, widget = wibox.container.background, bg = bg_popup, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 1, border_color = fg_grey, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 320, maximum_width = 520, } -- Click anywhere on the popup to close popup:connect_signal("button::press", function() close_popup() end) -- Close when mouse leaves the popup popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() close_popup() end) end -- Button bindings notif_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() -- left-click: toggle popup if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() -- right-click: clear all history = {} close_popup() refresh_label() end) )) return notif_widget

        set_label("no notifications")
    else
        local n = history[#history]
        local text = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message
        if #text > 45 then text = text:sub(1, 42) .. "..." end
        set_label("[" .. #history .. "] " .. gears.string.xml_escape(text))
    end
end

"] " .. gears.string.xml_escape(text)) end end -- Intercept naughty.notify to capture notifications (legacy naughty API) local _orig_notify = naughty.notify naughty.notify = function(args) local title = (args and args.title) or "" local message = (args and (args.text or args.message)) or "" if title ~= "" or message ~= "" then table.insert(history, { title = title, message = message, time = os.date("%H:%M"), }) if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end refresh_label() end return _orig_notify(args) end -- Build and show the history popup above the wibar (anchored top-right) local function show_popup() close_popup() if #history == 0 then return end local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( ' Notification history ', fg_green ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = 4, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }) -- Separator rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, span_ratio = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) -- Notification rows (newest first) for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( '%s' .. ' %s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = { top = 3, bottom = 3, left = 6, right = 6 }, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, }) end popup = awful.popup { widget = { rows, widget = wibox.container.background, bg = bg_popup, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 1, border_color = fg_grey, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 320, maximum_width = 520, } -- Click anywhere on the popup to close popup:connect_signal("button::press", function() close_popup() end) -- Close when mouse leaves the popup popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() close_popup() end) end -- Button bindings notif_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() -- left-click: toggle popup if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() -- right-click: clear all history = {} close_popup() refresh_label() end) )) return notif_widget
