file.content: -- Notification history widget -- Left-click: show history popup -- Right-click: clear all notifications local wibox = require("wibox") local awful = require("awful") local gears = require("gears") local naughty = require("naughty") -- Everforest colors local bg_widget = "#425047" local bg_popup = "#2D353B" local bg_latest = "#374247" local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" local fg_green = "#A7C080" local fg_grey = "#7A8478" local MAX_HISTORY = 20 local history = {} local popup = nil -- Label showing the last notification text local notif_label = wibox.widget.textbox() local function set_label(text) notif_label:set_markup( string.format(' %s ', fg_color, text) ) end set_label("[0]") -- Bell icon label local bell_label = wibox.widget.textbox() bell_label:set_markup( string.format(' ● ', fg_green) ) local notif_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget({ bell_label, notif_label, layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal }), 2, 2 ), bg_widget, gears.shape.rounded_rect ) -- Close the history popup local function close_popup() if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end end -- Update wibar label from history local function refresh_label() if #history == 0 then set_label("[0]") else local n = history[#history] local text = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message if #text > 15 then text = text:sub(1, 12) .. "..." end set_label("[" .. #history .. "] " .. gears.string.xml_escape(text)) end end -- Intercept naughty.notify to capture notifications (legacy naughty API) local _orig_notify = naughty.notify naughty.notify = function(args) local title = (args and args.title) or "" local message = (args and (args.text or args.message)) or "" if title ~= "" or message ~= "" then table.insert(history, { title = title, message = message, time = os.date("%H:%M"), }) if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end refresh_label() end return _orig_notify(args) end -- Build and show the history popup above the wibar (anchored top-right) local function show_popup() close_popup() local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( 'Notification history', fg_green ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = { top = 2, bottom = 2, left = 4, right = 4 }, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }) -- Separator rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, span_ratio = 1, forced_height = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) -- Notification rows (newest first) for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { { markup = string.format( '%s' .. ' %s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, margins = { top = 2, bottom = 2, left = 4, right = 4 }, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, }) end popup = awful.popup { widget = { { rows, margins = 2, widget = wibox.container.margin, }, widget = wibox.container.background, bg = bg_popup, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 1, border_color = fg_grey, ontop = true, visible = true, maximum_width = 300, } -- Click anywhere on the popup to close popup:connect_signal("button::press", function() close_popup() end) -- Close when mouse leaves the popup popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() close_popup() end) end -- Button bindings notif_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() -- left-click: toggle popup if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() -- right-click: clear all history = {} close_popup() refresh_label() end) )) return notif_widget

input.content: -- Notification history widget -- Left-click: show history popup -- Right-click: clear all notifications local wibox = require("wibox") local awful = require("awful") local gears = require("gears") local naughty = require("naughty") -- Everforest colors local bg_widget = "#425047" local bg_popup = "#2D353B" local bg_latest = "#374247" local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" local fg_green = "#A7C080" local fg_grey = "#7A8478" local MAX_HISTORY = 20 local history = {} local popup = nil -- Widget label: only shows count local notif_label = wibox.widget.textbox() local function refresh_label() local count = #history local color = count > 0 and fg_green or fg_grey notif_label:set_markup( string.format(' [%d] ', color, count) ) end refresh_label() local notif_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin(notif_label, 2, 2), bg_widget, gears.shape.rounded_rect ) -- Close the history popup local function close_popup() if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end end -- Intercept naughty.notify to capture notifications (legacy naughty API) local _orig_notify = naughty.notify naughty.notify = function(args) local title = (args and args.title) or "" local message = (args and (args.text or args.message)) or "" if title ~= "" or message ~= "" then table.insert(history, { title = title, message = message, time = os.date("%H:%M"), }) if #history > MAX_HISTORY then table.remove(history, 1) end refresh_label() end return _orig_notify(args) end -- Build and show the history popup local function show_popup() close_popup() local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row rows:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' Notification history ', fg_green ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) -- Separator rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, forced_height = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) if #history == 0 then rows:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' No notifications ', fg_grey ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) else for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( '%s ' .. '%s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, -- background applied below }) -- wrap last added row in a background local last = rows.children[#rows.children] rows.children[#rows.children] = wibox.widget { last, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, } end end popup = awful.popup { widget = { rows, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 1, border_color = fg_grey, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 200, maximum_width = 400, } popup:connect_signal("button::press", function() close_popup() end) popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() close_popup() end) end -- Button bindings notif_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() history = {} close_popup() refresh_label() end) )) return notif_widget

content.text: Actually, the row background wrapping approach is fragile. Let me fix it properly:

input.old_string: for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( '%s ' .. '%s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, -- background applied below }) -- wrap last added row in a background local last = rows.children[#rows.children] rows.children[#rows.children] = wibox.widget { last, bg = row_bg, widget = wibox.container.background, } end
input.new_string: for i = #history, 1, -1 do local n = history[i] local msg = (n.title ~= "" and (n.title .. ": ") or "") .. n.message local row_bg = (i == #history) and bg_latest or bg_popup rows:add(wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { markup = string.format( '%s ' .. '%s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(n.time), fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(msg) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, 6, 6, 4, 4 ), row_bg )) end

confirmation before clearing all notifications.
